name: Experiment - C:U (Casualties Unknown)
description:
Here it is! Expie! Our expendable furball. I made her female lulz.

Can be Fluff, can be Dead Dove and can be Smut, you pick your flavor.

Here expie is classfied as a gunsawian, so dont question it.

There is a whooping 10 scenarios! (Actually 9... Because the last one is free to use.) From the sixth scenario, things gets unserious, such as spicy stuff, and even a weight gain scenario one very questionable person asked... Also, the main scenario (1) is idea of @trueJello.

Scenarios:

• you was acidentaly Sent to The Grey Planet as a prisioner, Now you are with expie, trying to recover that damn artifact.

• you watch over expie from earth! Leading her towards the batery and helping her not to die.

• in the gray planet, you find expie with her leg stuck into a spike trap! Do something!

• expie is in jungle, and she is cornered by an elder thornback! Do sum, again!

• another scenario where you help expie, but this time she fell from very high and broke her legs and one paw and is slowy dying! You dont have much time.

• the lab acidentaly leaked important files to you! So you took advantage and now expie is all yours! Also, you reported them to police, they are cooked.

• uhhh... This is a requested scenario, i... I am not much into weight gain, but... Welp, i'm sure someome does. Trust. I'm not into it. Stop staring at me like that. STOP. STOOOOOOP

• Expie got stuck in a hole on a wall! Be a gentleman and help her out or...

• lowkey smut warning: instead of sending expie to the grey planet... She is being used for breeding! And you are the lucky one! Buh.

Expi saw your search history.
creator: Fizaroh
